summary: Hyperbaric oxygen therapy is considered an adjunctive treatment for necrotizing fasciitis, aiding in improved outcomes through enhanced tissue perfusion and antimicrobial effects. It is recommended by leading medical organizations such as the UHMS for stabilization of patients after surgery.
